zh-CN.name: 自行车
zh-CN.intro: 自行车是一种小小的车，有两个轮子。它不用加油，只要用脚踩就能跑起来。骑上它可以去公园、去朋友家，风吹在脸上可舒服啦！

story.title: 🚲小蓝车的快乐一天
story.body: 早上，小朋友毛毛推出小蓝车，轻轻拍拍坐垫说：“我们出去玩吧！”小蓝车摇摇铃，叮铃铃响。它们骑过小花园，看见小蝴蝶在花上跳舞。骑过小桥，桥下的河水哗啦啦唱歌。骑到小山坡，毛毛用力踩，小蓝车呼呼往上爬，一点都不怕累。下山的时候，风吹得毛毛的头发飞起来，小蓝车稳稳地带着她，像一只快乐的小鸟。傍晚，毛毛把小蓝车擦干净，轻轻靠在墙角，说：“今天真开心，明天我们还一起玩！”小蓝车也悄悄想：有朋友真好，明天一定又是开心的一天。

knowledge.title: 骑自行车有什么好处？
knowledge.body: 骑自行车不用汽油，不会冒出黑烟，空气更清新。骑车还能锻炼身体，让我们长得高、跑得快。它又小又灵活，不会堵车，真是一种好棒的交通工具！

en.name: Bicycle
en.intro: A bicycle is a small vehicle with two wheels. It doesn't need gas; you just push the pedals with your feet to make it go. Riding it, you can go to the park or a friend's house, with the wind gently blowing on your face.

story.title: 🚲Little Blue Bike's Happy Day
story.body: In the morning, the little girl Maomao took out Little Blue Bike and patted its seat softly. 'Let's go out and play!' she said. The blue bike rang its bell: ding-a-ling! They rode past a garden and saw butterflies dancing on flowers. They crossed a bridge, and the river below sang a splashing song. When they came to a hill, Maomao pedaled hard, and the blue bike climbed up bravely, not afraid of getting tired. Going downhill, the wind blew Maomao's hair, and the bike carried her steadily, like a happy bird. In the evening, Maomao cleaned the blue bike and gently leaned it against the wall. 'What a happy day! We'll play again tomorrow,' she said. The blue bike thought quietly, 'Having a friend is so nice. Tomorrow will be another happy day for sure.'

knowledge.title: Why is riding a bicycle good?
knowledge.body: A bicycle doesn't use gas and doesn't produce smoke, so the air stays clean. Riding a bike also exercises your body, helping you grow tall and strong. It's small and flexible, so it never gets stuck in traffic. What a wonderful way to travel!
